          simpa [hcard] using this) (by
          -- `d * #ЁЭУТ тЙд d * #ЁЭУТ`
          exact le_rfl)
      -- Sum inequalities.
      have := sum_le_sum fun ЁЭУТ hЁЭУТ тЖж hpart ЁЭУТ hЁЭУТ
      -- Rewrite the right-hand side using `sum_card_parts_eq` and factor out `d`.
      -- `P` is a finpartition of `ЁЭУХ`.
      simpa [mul_sum, P.sum_card_parts_eq] using this
    exact hsum
  simpa [hsup] using hle

classical
  classical
  have hsup :=
    congrArg (fun s тЖж #(s : Finset (Set ╬▒ ├Ч Set ╬▒)))
      (sup_finiteSymmDiffFinpartition_hypercubeEdgeFinset (ЁЭУХ := ЁЭУХ))
  -- `hsup : #((finiteSymmDiffFinpartition ЁЭУХ).parts.sup hypercubeEdgeFinset) = #(hypercubeEdgeFinset ЁЭУХ)`
  have hle :
      #((finiteSymmDiffFinpartition ЁЭУХ).parts.sup hypercubeEdgeFinset) тЙд
        ((finiteSymmDiffFinpartition ЁЭУХ).parts.card) * (d * #ЁЭУХ) := by
    -- crude bound: `sup` over `parts` has cardinal тЙд sum of cardinals, and each part contributes тЙд `d * #ЁЭУХ`
    refine le_trans (Finset.card_sup_le _ _) ?_
    refine le_trans (Finset.sum_le_sum fun ЁЭУТ hЁЭУТ тЖж ?_) ?_
    ┬╖ -- bound each summand by `d * #ЁЭУХ`
      have hЁЭУТ' :
          IsNIPWith d (ЁЭУТ : Set (Set ╬▒)) := by
        exact hЁЭУХ.mono (by
          intro A hA
          exact (by
            have : A тИИ ЁЭУХ := by
              simpa using (Finset.mem_of_mem_filter hA)
            simpa using this))
      have : #(hypercubeEdgeFinset ЁЭУТ) тЙд d * #ЁЭУТ := by
        classical
        -- use the finite-type bound on the restricted component
        have hfin :
            IsNIPWith d
              (restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent ЁЭУТ :
                Set (Set тЖС((тЛГ A тИИ ЁЭУТ, A) \ тЛВ A тИИ ЁЭУТ, A))) :=
          IsNIPWith.restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent (d := d) (ЁЭУТ := ЁЭУТ) hЁЭУТ'
        classical
        haveI : Finite тЖС((тЛГ A тИИ ЁЭУТ, A) \ тЛВ A тИИ ЁЭУТ, A) := by
          classical
          -- the underlying type is finite because it is a subset of a finite type
          infer_instance
        -- apply the lemma to the restricted family, then transfer card via `card_restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent`
        have hbound :=
          (_root_.IsNIPWith.card_hypercubeEdgeFinset_le_of_finite (╬▒ := тЖС((тЛГ A тИИ ЁЭУТ, A) \ тЛВ A тИИ ЁЭУТ, A))
              (ЁЭУХ := restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent ЁЭУТ) (d := d) hfin)
        simpa [card_restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent] using hbound
      exact le_trans this (Nat.mul_le_mul_left d (Finset.card_le_card_of_subset
        (by
          intro A hA
          have : A тИИ ЁЭУХ := by
            -- `ЁЭУТ` is a part of the finpartition, hence subset of `ЁЭУХ`
            have hsub : (ЁЭУТ : Set (Set ╬▒)) тКЖ ЁЭУХ := by
              intro X hX
              -- parts are subsets of `ЁЭУХ`
              have := (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition ЁЭУХ).subset_of_mem_parts hЁЭУТ hX
              simpa using this
            exact hsub hA
          simpa using this)))
    ┬╖ -- sum bound by `card parts * (d * #ЁЭУХ)`
      simpa [Finset.sum_const_nat] using
        (Nat.mul_le_mul_left ((finiteSymmDiffFinpartition ЁЭУХ).parts.card) (Nat.le_refl (d * #ЁЭУХ)))
  -- finish
  have := le_trans (by simpa [hsup] using hle) (by
    -- `parts.card тЙд #ЁЭУХ` and absorb
    have hpc : (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition ЁЭУХ).parts.card тЙд #ЁЭУХ :=
      (finiteSymmDiffFinpartition ЁЭУХ).card_parts_le
    nlinarith)
  exact this
